channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Shohei Ohtani and four other Japanese players come home to start the MLB season
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — It's only two games to start the Major League Baseball season — the World Series-champion Dodgers against the Chicago Cubs on Tuesday and Wednesday at the Tokyo Dome. For the record, the MLB regular season consists of almost 2,500 games.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WADE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Stephen Curry becomes first player in NBA history to make 4,000 3-pointers
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Stephen Curry's shooting range and accuracy from way back have long stood alone — whether with a defender or two in his face or when letting it fly from the logo.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Heartbreak for DePaul as 1st trip to Big East semifinals slips away with late collapse at MSG
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — At long last, downtrodden DePaul was finally about to produce its own indelible moment at the Big East Tournament. A big upset was in the bag for the Blue Demons — and their first trip to the semifinals at Madison Square Garden. And then it slipped through their fingers.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Hepburn's buzzer-beater lifts No. 13 Louisville to another big moment in Kelsey-led resurgence
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Chucky Hepburn had given up the ball late in a tie game to a teammate, and it looked like the next time he might touch the ball again would come in overtime.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Stanford out of ACC tournament on Louisville buzzer-beater in furious finish
item.description: The Cardinal erased an eight-point deficit in the final two minutes, but Louisville made the last bucket.
item.dc:creator: Mike Barber, The Mercury News

item.title: Boys Volleyball: El Cajon Valley 3, Patrick Henry 0
item.description: EL CAJON (KUSI)- Boys volleyball action on Wednesday evening with El Cajon Valley beating Patrick Henry in three to run their record to 12-2 on the season.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Boys Volleyball: Maranatha 3, Monte Vista 1
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Boys volleyball Maranatha went on the road to Spring Valley and beat Monte Vista in four sets.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Third MLB hat pulled over accidental vulgarity as others sell for hundreds online
item.description: Yet another newly released MLB hat has been pulled from online stores after fans noted the potentially crass design the cap sported.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, WGN 9

item.title: Southwest Airlines takes aim at Mavericks, Luka Doncic as carrier navigates turbulence over baggage fee policy
item.description: The airline continues to contend with backlash after revealing plans to apply a checked bag fee. But the carrier briefly deflected the fallout to the Mavericks.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: John Feinstein, bestselling author and Washington Post sportswriter, dead at 68
item.description: John Feinstein, a bestselling author of 50 books and a longtime Washington Post sports writer and columnist, died at the age of 68 Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jones scores 28 as No. 25 Marquette rallies past Xavier 89-87 in Big East quarterfinal
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Kam Jones scored 28 points and No. 25 Marquette rallied past Xavier 89-87 on Thursday in the Big East Tournament quarterfinals. After trailing by 14 early in the second half, the fifth-seeded Golden Eagles (23-9) took the lead for good at 81-80 on Jones' layup with 1:16 remaining.
item.dc:creator: EVERETT MERRILL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kansas baseball team ties NCAA record with 5 straight home runs in 29-1 victory over Minnesota
item.description: The Kansas Jayhawks baseball team hit five consecutive home runs against the Minnesota Golden Gophers on Wednesday at U.S. Bank Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: USF Women's Basketball going to NCAA Tournament
item.description: No. 3 South Florida (23-10) defeated No. 9 Rice (17-17), 69-62, in the 2025 American Women’s Basketball Championship final on Wednesday evening, March 12, at Dickies Arena in Fort Worth, Texas.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: No. 1 Duke beats Georgia Tech 78-70 after losing Flagg, Brown to injuries in ACC quarterfinals
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Kon Knueppel scored 28 points as No. 1 Duke overcame injuries to star Cooper Flagg and Maliq Brown to beat Georgia Tech 78-70 on Thursday and advance to the ACC Tournament semifinals.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bills’ Josh Allen quips back at reporter over ring upgrade question after lucrative contract extension
item.description: Bills quarterback Josh Allen was questioned by a reporter this week on whether he intends to upgrade Hailee Steinfeld’s engagement ring after signing a lucrative contract extension.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Xavier Worthy accuser gets protective order against Chiefs star after DA declines to pursue assault case
item.description: A protective order against Xavier Worthy was granted by a Texas judge to a woman that accused the Chiefs star of assault last week. The DA declined to pursue the case at this time.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: F1's Mercedes chief Wolff says he's not looking to sign Verstappen for 2026
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Mercedes team principal and chief executive Toto Wolff has denied rumors on the eve of the Australian Grand Prix weekend that he’s still seeking to sign reigning F1 world champion Max Verstappen for 2026.
item.dc:creator: STEWART BELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: UVU advances to WAC Tournament semifinals
item.description: LAS VEGAS (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Valley men's basketball team is two wins away from its first ever bid to the NCAA Tournament. Tanner Toolson poured in 16 points as the Wolverines cruised past Utah Tech in the WAC Tournament semifinals Wednesday night at the Orleans Arena in Las Vegas, 74-57.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jazz give Grizzlies a scare, but lose seventh straight
item.description: MEMPHIS (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Jazz are well on their way to their worst record in franchise history, but they're not going down without a fight. Luke Kennard scored 30 points and Ja Morant had 28, helping the Memphis Grizzlies top the Utah Jazz 122-115 on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Aztecs Men's Basketball to face Boise State in Mountain West Tournament Quarterfinals, Magoon Gwath status day to day
item.description: 4-seed Aztecs Men's Basketball to face 5-seed Boise State in Mountain West Tournament Quarterfinals, 7-foot forward Magoon Gwath status day to day.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: Southwestern League basketball All-Conference teams announced
item.description: It was a wild season filled with buzzer-beaters and many other incredible moments, as we congratulate the great players honored on this year's Southwestern League All-Conference Teams.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Report: Bears sign DE Dayo Odeyingbo to 3-year deal
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. — The Bears have signed defensive end Dayo Odeyingbo to a three-year deal, according to NFL insider Ian Rapoport. The 25-year-old was a second-round pick by the Colts in 2021 and addresses a need the team had on the defensive line.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Report: Bears sign center Drew Dalman to 3-year deal
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. — The Bears have signed top free agent center Drew Dalman, according to ESPN's Adam Schefter. The 26-year-old former Falcon completes an overhaul of the Bears' interior offensive line after Poles and company jumped the market by trading for guards Joe Thuney and Jonah Jackson.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Bills reward Allen with new contract after NFL MVP season. Deal is worth $330M, AP source says
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — NFL MVP Josh Allen was rewarded Sunday with a contract extension worth $330 million, including an NFL record $250 million of it guaranteed, which makes him among the league’s highest-paid players.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Real Salt Lake aims to keep winning as San Diego FC visits for the first time
item.description: Real Salt Lake returns to action at America First Field on Saturday night, facing MLS expansion side San Diego FC for the first time. Coming off a commanding 2-0 win over Seattle last weekend, RSL looks to build momentum and keep their shutout streak alive in front of their raucous home crowd.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Utah's comeback falls short in 4-3 overtime loss
item.description: CHICAGO (ABC4 Sports) - Connor Bedard scored at 3:10 of overtime to give the Chicago Blackhawks a 4-3 victory against the Utah Hockey Club at United Center on Friday. Bedard circled the net and scored from the slot after going eight games without a goal.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Girls Basketball: Mater Dei Catholic 59, Carlsbad 52
item.description: Mater Dei Catholic winning and advancing to the Division III State Regional semifinals, 59-52 over Carlsbad,
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: Bay FC coaching staff facing investigation after complaints over head coach
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- Days after Bay FC unveiled renderings for its slick new training facility on Treasure Island, the team is facing more troubling allegations regarding its backroom staff.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4
